26880.title: The Kettering Incident
26880.description: Anna Macy left Kettering when she was just 14, shortly after her best friend disappeared in the forest. When Anna returns 15 years later, the town is struggling to survive.

26885.title: The Kettering Incident
26885.description: Anna Macy left Kettering when she was just 14, shortly after her best friend disappeared in the forest. When Anna returns 15 years later, the town is struggling to survive.

26913.title: The Kettering Incident
26913.description: The town is in crisis with the discovery of toxic water. Anna is questioned by Fergus and Dutch after her fingerprints are discovered on evidence relating to the crime scene.

26917.title: The Kettering Incident
26917.description: The town is in crisis with the discovery of toxic water. Anna is questioned by Fergus and Dutch after her fingerprints are discovered on evidence relating to the crime scene.

31673.title: The Kettering Incident
31673.description: Anna wakes out of a fugue in her father's house the morning after the party. Meanwhile, Chloe has gone missing and Grayson, Roy and Max seem to be sharing a dark secret.

31678.title: The Kettering Incident
31678.description: Anna wakes out of a fugue in her father's house the morning after the party. Meanwhile, Chloe has gone missing and Grayson, Roy and Max seem to be sharing a dark secret.

31706.title: The Kettering Incident
31706.description: Anna wakes in the asylum with Dr McKenzie waiting for her, but she stealthily escapes while McKenzie is out of the room. Meanwhile, Dane finally hears Eliza calling from under the dam.

31710.title: The Kettering Incident
